items.title: World Cup debutants to wear collectable patches on shirts
items.summary: All players who make their first tournament appearance at this summer's Fifa World Cup will wear a debut patch on their shirts.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Hansi Flick’s Father Passes Away Ahead Of El Clásico, Barcelona Confirms
items.summary: Barcelona have confirmed the death of Hansi Flick's father on the morning of their El Clasico clash with Real Madrid.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
